name: HistorySettings
summary: Provides static (Shared in Vb.Net) properties to modify Rhino History settings.

properties.name: BrokenRecordWarningEnabled
properties.summary: Displays a warning dialog when an action is taken that breaks the link between the output and input objects.

properties.name: ObjectLockingEnabled
properties.summary: When history object locking is enabled, objects with history on them act as if they were locked and the only way to modify these objects is to edit their inputs.

properties.name: RecordingEnabled
properties.summary: When history recording is enabled, new objects keep a record of how they were constructed so that they can be updated if an input object changes.

properties.name: RecordNextCommand
properties.summary: Enable history recording until the end of the next command

properties.name: UpdateEnabled
properties.summary: When history update is enabled, dependent objects are automatically updated when an antecedent is modified.
